# QA Plan: Input Handling Epic
**Date**: 2026-05-02
**Generated by**: /qa-plan input-handling
**Scope**: 10 stories across 1 system (Foundation layer — `InputRouter` autoload)
**Engine**: Godot 4.6 (GdUnit4 v6.1.2)
**Sprint**: Sprint-3 S3-04 (scaffolding); implementation falls into sprint-4 per EPIC.md scope note
**Epic file**: `production/epics/input-handling/EPIC.md`
**GDD**: `design/gdd/input-handling.md` (5 Core Rules CR-1..CR-5; 22-action vocabulary; 7-state FSM S0..S6; 3 formulas F-1..F-3; 18 ACs)
**Governing ADR**: ADR-0005 (Accepted 2026-04-30 delta #6) — first **HIGH** engine-risk ADR + first STATEFUL Foundation autoload

---

| Story | Type | Automated Test Required | Manual Verification Required |
|-------|------|------------------------|------------------------------|
| 001 — Module skeleton + autoload | Logic (skeleton) | Unit — `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_skeleton_test.gd` (≥6) | None |
| 002 — Action vocab + bindings JSON | Logic | Unit — `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_actions_bindings_test.gd` (≥10) + fixture `tests/fixtures/input/test_bindings_minimal.json` | None |
| 003 — FSM core S0↔S1↔S2 move | Logic | Unit — `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_fsm_core_test.gd` (≥12) + stub `tests/helpers/grid_battle_stub.gd` | None |
| 004 — FSM attack S3↔S4 + ST-2 | Logic | Unit — `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_fsm_attack_st2_test.gd` (≥10) + GridBattleStub `confirm_attack` extension | None |
| 005 — Mode determination CR-2 | Logic + 2 Polish-defer V/F | Unit — `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_mode_test.gd` (≥8) | Verification #1 dual-focus + #2 SDL3 gamepad (Polish-deferable evidence docs) |
| 006 — Per-unit undo window | Logic | Unit — `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_undo_window_test.gd` (≥10) + GridBattleStub 5-method extension | None |
| 007 — INPUT_BLOCKED + MENU_OPEN | Integration | Integration — `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_block_menu_test.gd` (≥12) | Verification #4 recursive-Control-disable evidence (mandatory headless) |
| 008 — Touch part A (TPP + Magnifier + F-1) | Integration + 2 V/F | Integration — `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_touch_part_a_test.gd` (≥12) + 2 new stubs (`battle_hud_stub.gd`, `camera_stub.gd`) + `map_grid_stub.gd` extension | Verification #3 emulate_mouse_from_touch (mandatory headless) + #5a screen_get_size (mandatory macOS dev; Android Polish-defer) |
| 009 — Touch part B (pan/tap/gestures/panel) | Integration + 2 V/F | Integration — `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_touch_part_b_test.gd` (≥10) | Verification #5b safe-area API (mandatory headless 3-candidate) + #6 touch event index (Polish-deferable physical hardware) |
| 010 — Epic terminal (perf + 9 lints) | Config/Data | Performance — `tests/performance/foundation/input_router_perf_test.gd` (4 tests) + 9 CI lint scripts at `tools/ci/lint_input_router_*.sh` + `lint_emulate_mouse_from_touch.sh` + `lint_balance_entities_input_handling.sh` | Epic-terminal `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_summary.md` rollup + 3 TD entries |

**Test growth trajectory**: 743 (current baseline post hp-status epic) → 749 → 759 → 771 → 781 → 789 → 799 → 811 → 823 → 833 → **≥837 final epic baseline** (+94 tests across 10 stories).

## Automated Tests Required

### Story 001 — Module skeleton + autoload registration (Logic, ≥6 tests)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_skeleton_test.gd`

**What to test** (story ACs 1-11, no GDD AC mapping — structural):
- `extends Node` declaration at `src/foundation/input_router.gd` (NOT RefCounted; NOT Resource)
- 6 instance fields with exact types per ADR-0005 §1 line 119: `_state` / `_active_mode` / `_pre_menu_state` / `_undo_windows: Dictionary[int, UndoEntry]` / `_input_blocked_reasons: PackedStringArray` / `_bindings: Dictionary[StringName, Array[InputEvent]]`
- `enum InputState` with 7 members in canonical S0..S6 order (int values 0..6 wire-format)
- `enum InputMode` with 2 MVP members KEYBOARD_MOUSE=0, TOUCH=1 (GAMEPAD reserved at int 2 per OQ-1)
- `InputContext` Resource at `src/foundation/payloads/input_context.gd` instantiates with default `coord = Vector2i.ZERO` + `unit_id = -1`
- `UndoEntry` RefCounted at `src/foundation/payloads/undo_entry.gd` with 3 fields default-initialized
- `project.godot` `[autoload]` section contains `InputRouter="*res://src/foundation/input_router.gd"` at load order 4 (after GameBus + SceneManager + SaveManager)
- 4 method stubs: `get_active_input_mode() -> InputMode`, `get_state() -> InputState`, `set_binding(action, event) -> void`, `_handle_event(event) -> void`
- NO `_ready()` body yet (story-007 wires GameBus subs; story-002 wires JSON load)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- G-3 verification: try `class_name InputRouter` first — drop if collision fires per Implementation Note #1
- G-14 import refresh: run `godot --headless --import --path .` BEFORE first test run
- G-17 collision pre-check: assert `InputRouter` / `InputContext` / `UndoEntry` not Godot built-ins

**Estimated test count**: ~6-8 unit tests (structural assertions via `FileAccess.get_file_as_string()` + content matches per turn-order story-001 G-22 precedent)

---

### Story 002 — 22-action vocab + bindings JSON + InputMap (Logic, ≥10 tests)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_actions_bindings_test.gd`
**Fixture path**: `tests/fixtures/input/test_bindings_minimal.json` (3-action minimal — must be authored)

**What to test** (story ACs 1-11 → GDD AC-1, AC-2):
- `ACTIONS_BY_CATEGORY: Dictionary[StringName, Array[StringName]]` const with exactly 22 actions in 4 categories (grid 10 / camera 4 / menu 5 / meta 3); spot-check 5 specific StringName values present
- `assets/data/input/default_bindings.json` exists; JSON parse succeeds; 21 non-meta keys (22 - `grid_hover` PC-only); values are `Array[Dictionary]` with valid `type` field
- `_ready()` loads via `FileAccess.get_file_as_string()` + `JSON.new().parse()` — FATAL `push_error` + early-return on missing/parse-fail (R-5 mitigation)
- `_populate_input_map()` calls `InputMap.add_action()` + `InputMap.action_add_event()` (NOT `Input.parse_input_event()` per delta #6 Item 8 — assert via grep test)
- R-5 parity validator: `bound_count == declared_count - 1 (grid_hover)` else FATAL push_error containing "schema drift detected"
- AC-1 GDD: each of 22 actions has ≥1 binding in `default_bindings.json` (excluding `grid_hover`); `_handle_event(InputEventKey with KEY_ENTER)` sets `_last_matched_action == &"action_confirm"`
- AC-2 GDD: dynamic rebinding via fixture file — load fixture mapping `action_confirm` to KEY_SPACE → `InputMap.action_get_events("action_confirm")` returns SPACE event
- `_unhandled_input(event)` override delegates to `_handle_event(event)` (NOT `_input(event)` per Advisory C dual-focus)
- `_handle_event` matching loop iterates `for category: StringName in ACTIONS_BY_CATEGORY.keys()` with nested `InputMap.action_has_event` check

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Invalid JSON (truncated) → push_error fires
- Wrong shape (top-level Array) → push_error fires
- Malformed parity (22 keys including `grid_hover` accidentally) → FATAL on extra key
- Underflow parity (20 keys, one missing) → FATAL on missing
- Production `default_bindings.json` md5 unchanged before vs after AC-7 dynamic-rebinding test (G-15 isolation)

**Estimated test count**: ~10-12 unit tests

---

### Story 003 — FSM core S0↔S1↔S2 move flow (Logic, ≥12 tests)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_fsm_core_test.gd`
**Stub path**: `tests/helpers/grid_battle_stub.gd` (must be authored — first new stub for this epic)

**What to test** (story ACs 1-11 → GDD AC-10 move, AC-15):
- `_handle_action(action: StringName, ctx: InputContext)` dispatches via `match _state` to per-state handlers
- S0 (OBSERVATION) handles `&"unit_select"` with `ctx.unit_id != -1` → transition to S1; emits `input_state_changed(0, 1)` + `input_action_fired(&"unit_select", ctx)`
- S1 (UNIT_SELECTED) handles `&"move_target_select"` validating `is_tile_in_move_range(ctx.coord)` via stub → S2; cancel routes back to S0
- S2 (MOVEMENT_PREVIEW) handles `&"move_confirm"` (and `&"action_confirm"` alias per CR-3a) → calls `confirm_move(unit_id, coord)` stub → S0; cancel routes back to S1
- AC-15 GDD: every state transition emits `input_state_changed(prev, new)` exactly once BEFORE downstream processing (signal-capture pattern G-4 Array-append from `before_test()`-connected lambdas)
- AC-10 GDD move portion: S1 → S2 on tap-destination, S2 → S0 on tap-confirm; both transitions emit signal pairs
- Re-entrancy hazard: subscriber WITHOUT `Object.CONNECT_DEFERRED` calling `_handle_event` mid-dispatch → assertion-detectable behavior (locks the contract; production safety relies on ADR-0001 §5)
- Invalid (state, action) combinations silently ignored — sweep 7 states × 22 actions ≥ 154 cases for crash-free; emits only on validated transitions
- GridBattleStub interface: `is_tile_in_move_range` (true for hardcoded `{(1,1), (2,2), (3,3)}`); `is_tile_in_attack_range` (story-004); `confirm_move` records call to test-observable Array
- Stub injection seam: `set_grid_battle_for_tests(stub)` test-only; production via `set_grid_battle()` from future Battle Preparation ADR

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Invalid coord (`Vector2i.ZERO`) in S1 move target → silent drop
- Out-of-range tile (stub returns false) → silent drop, state stays S1
- Re-entrant emit during dispatch (locks contract, production relies on deferred-connect)
- Camera actions (`camera_pan`/`camera_zoom_in/out`/`camera_snap_to_unit`) emit pass-through in S0 with no state change

**Estimated test count**: ~12-14 unit tests

---

### Story 004 — FSM attack S3↔S4 + ST-2 demotion (Logic, ≥10 tests)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_fsm_attack_st2_test.gd`

**What to test** (story ACs 1-11 → GDD AC-10 attack, AC-11):
- S1 → S3 on `&"attack_target_select"` validating `is_tile_in_attack_range(ctx.coord)` stub
- S3 → S4 on `&"attack_confirm"` / `&"action_confirm"` alias
- S4 → S0 on second `&"attack_confirm"` → calls `confirm_attack(unit_id, coord)` stub + closes undo window placeholder
- ST-2 demotion helper `_apply_st2_demotion(restored_state) -> InputState`: pure function — S2/S4 → S1; other states unchanged. Used by S6 menu-close (story-007 invokes)
- AC-10 GDD attack portion: S1 → S3 → S4 → S0 chain emits 6 signals total (3 transitions × 2-emit-pair)
- AC-11 GDD end-player-turn safety gate: 2-beat `&"end_player_turn"` (request, NO state change, sets `_pending_end_phase = true`) → `&"end_phase_confirm"` (consumes flag, fires confirm); `&"action_cancel"` resets flag without firing
- Re-targeting AC-2: S3 with `&"attack_target_select"` again — state stays S3 (NO `input_state_changed`), emits `input_action_fired` with new ctx only
- ST-2 demotion sweep — 7 (state, expected) pairs: (S0, S0), (S1, S1), (S2, S1), (S3, S3), (S4, S1), (S5, S5), (S6, S6)
- GridBattleStub `confirm_attack` extension records call to `confirm_attack_calls` Array
- New `_pending_end_phase: bool` field — transient scratch, NOT in ADR-0005 §1 6-field list, G-15 reset adds it

**Edge cases to cover**:
- `&"attack_cancel"` in S3 → S1 (NOT S0)
- `&"attack_cancel"` in S4 → S3 (NOT S1)
- Out-of-range attack tile (stub returns false) → silent drop in S1
- `&"end_phase_confirm"` without prior `&"end_player_turn"` (no flag set) → silent no-op
- `&"action_cancel"` during `_pending_end_phase` → resets flag, no confirm fire

**Estimated test count**: ~10-12 unit tests

---

### Story 005 — Mode determination CR-2 (Logic, ≥8 tests + 2 V/F evidence docs)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_mode_test.gd`

**What to test** (story ACs 1-11 → GDD AC-3, AC-4):
- `_determine_mode_from_event(event) -> InputMode` returns TOUCH for `InputEventScreenTouch`/`InputEventScreenDrag`; KEYBOARD_MOUSE for Mouse/Key/Joypad (uses `is` type-narrowing per godot-specialist Item 1 PASS)
- `_handle_event` extension: calls `_determine_mode_from_event` BEFORE action match; on mode change sets `_active_mode` + emits `GameBus.input_mode_changed.emit(int(new_mode))` (delta #6 wire-format: explicit `int()` cast)
- AC-3 GDD: mode switch within same frame; emit captured by signal subscriber
- AC-4 GDD state preservation: switching mode preserves `_state` AND `_undo_windows` (CR-2c)
- Idempotency: multiple consecutive same-class events emit `input_mode_changed` ZERO times
- TR-011 joypad routing: `InputEventJoypadButton` → KEYBOARD_MOUSE (NOT GAMEPAD value); confirms MVP OQ-1 partial resolution
- Mode-detection sweep — 7 (event_class, expected_mode) cases: MouseButton/Motion/Key/JoypadButton/JoypadMotion → KM; ScreenTouch/ScreenDrag → TOUCH
- `get_active_input_mode()` getter returns updated value across mode switches

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Unknown event subtype → returns current `_active_mode` (defensive)
- First non-key (touch) event after series of key events triggers exactly 1 emit (no debounce)
- Bluetooth gamepad mid-scene plug-in does NOT promote to GAMEPAD mode

**Estimated test count**: ~8-10 unit tests

**Visual/Feel evidence (Polish-deferable, on-device)**:
- `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_01_dual_focus.md` — Android 14+ emulator + macOS Metal: tap Control with `focus_mode = FOCUS_ALL`, then arrow key → confirm `_active_mode` switches per most-recent-event-class rule, NOT per focus-channel ownership. Reactivation trigger: Android export green AND mac dev box available. Headless fallback: synthetic event injection covers the engine doesn't subvert event-class identity.
- `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_02_sdl3_gamepad.md` — Android 15 / iOS 17 Bluetooth controller mid-scene: `InputEventJoypadButton` arrives AND `_active_mode` STAYS `KEYBOARD_MOUSE`. Reactivation trigger: physical Bluetooth gamepad + Android export. Headless fallback: AC-6 synthetic test.

---

### Story 006 — Per-unit undo window (Logic, ≥10 tests)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_undo_window_test.gd`

**What to test** (story ACs 1-11 → GDD AC-12, AC-13, AC-14, EC-5):
- `_open_undo_window(unit_id, pre_move_coord, pre_move_facing)` invoked from S2 `&"move_confirm"` arm AFTER state → S0; per CR-5b depth 1 — overwrite if entry exists
- `_close_undo_window(unit_id)` from 3 sites: (a) S4 attack confirm, (b) S1 `&"end_unit_turn"` for that unit, (c) S0 `&"end_phase_confirm"` (ALL via `_undo_windows.clear()`)
- `_apply_undo(unit_id) -> bool`: returns false if `!_undo_windows.has(unit_id)` (AC-13); returns false if `is_tile_occupied(pre_move_coord)` (AC-14 EC-5); on success calls `restore_unit_to_pre_move(unit_id, coord, facing)` stub + clears entry + sets `_state = UNIT_SELECTED` + emits pair
- `&"undo_last_move"` handled in S0 AND S1 arms — routes to `_apply_undo`
- AC-12 GDD: undo valid path — restore_calls contains `{unit_id, coord, facing}`; state == UNIT_SELECTED; `_undo_windows.has(1) == false`
- AC-13 GDD: undo rejected after attack (window closed via site (a)) — returns false; no restore call; state unchanged
- AC-14 GDD: undo blocked by tile occupation — returns false; entry STILL present (rejection doesn't pop — player can retry once tile clears); state unchanged
- End-phase confirm clears all undo windows (site (c)) — `_undo_windows.is_empty() == true`; subsequent undo for any unit returns false
- Memory bound (informational) — allocate 24 UndoEntries; assert `_undo_windows.size() == 24`; informal heap guardrail per ADR-0005 §1 R-2 (~2 KB)
- GridBattleStub extensions: `restore_unit_to_pre_move`, `is_tile_occupied`, `occupied_coords` field for fixture injection

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Open undo for unit that already has an entry → overwrites (depth 1 per CR-5b)
- Undo immediately after `_open_undo_window` (in S0) → succeeds
- Undo for unit with `unit_id = -1` (sentinel) → `_undo_windows.has(-1)` returns false; no-op
- Multi-unit undo independence: unit 1 closes via `end_unit_turn`, unit 2 entry untouched

**Estimated test count**: ~10-12 unit tests

---

### Story 007 — INPUT_BLOCKED + MENU_OPEN (Integration, ≥12 tests + 1 V/F evidence)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_block_menu_test.gd`

**What to test** (story ACs 1-11 → GDD AC-16, AC-17, EC-2, EC-3):
- `_ready()` subscribes to ADR-0002 `GameBus.ui_input_block_requested` + `ui_input_unblock_requested` via `Object.CONNECT_DEFERRED` (re-entrancy mitigation per ADR-0001 §5)
- `_on_ui_input_block_requested(reason)` appends to `_input_blocked_reasons` PackedStringArray; on FIRST entry: capture `_pre_block_state` + transition to S5 + emit pair; on subsequent entries: state stays S5, no emit (idempotent re-entry)
- `_on_ui_input_unblock_requested(reason)` removes reason; on FINAL exit (`_input_blocked_reasons.is_empty()`): restore `_pre_block_state` + emit pair; nested exits no-op
- `_handle_action_in_s5` silently DROPS grid actions (10 grid + grid_hover); PERMITS camera actions (4) + `&"open_unit_info"`; silent drops MUST call `get_viewport().set_input_as_handled()` BEFORE returning (Advisory C forbidden_pattern — story-010 lint)
- Nested-block test: block(transition) → block(dialog) → unblock(dialog) → unblock(transition): exactly 1 emit on first entry, 0 on 2nd, 0 on 1st exit, 1 on final exit restoring prior
- `_handle_action_in_s6` handles `&"close_menu"` → `_state = _apply_st2_demotion(_pre_menu_state)` (story-004 helper integration); other S6 actions silent
- AC-16 GDD: S2 → S6 (via `&"open_game_menu"` setting `_pre_menu_state = S2`) → S6 close → S1 (NOT S2 — pending move-confirm dropped per ST-2)
- AC-17 GDD: S5 active + `&"unit_select"` → silent drop, no emit, no Grid Battle stub call; `set_input_as_handled()` invoked. Camera pan + open_unit_info STILL function (separate sub-test)
- New `_pre_block_state: InputState` field (transient — NOT in 6-field list); G-15 reset to `OBSERVATION`

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Unblock with reason that's not in stack → push_warning, no state mutation
- Block requested while already in MENU_OPEN (S6) → state takes S5 priority? Per ADR-0005 — block always wins; capture `_pre_block_state = S6`; menu still rendered but input blocked
- `&"close_menu"` while `_pre_menu_state = S5` (impossible by construction but defensive) → ST-2 demotion returns S5 unchanged

**Estimated test count**: ~12-14 integration tests (multi-system: GameBus signal subscription + nested state machine)

**Visual/Feel evidence (mandatory headless — NOT Polish-deferable per EPIC.md item-#4)**:
- `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_04_recursive_control_disable.md` — confirms SceneManager `InputRouter.set_process_input(false) + set_process_unhandled_input(false)` silences both `_input` + `_unhandled_input` callbacks. Mount InputRouter, call both setters, inject synthetic event, assert no `_handle_event` invocation. Status MUST be "Verified" before story ships.

---

### Story 008 — Touch part A: TPP + Magnifier + F-1 (Integration, ≥12 tests + 2 V/F evidence)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_touch_part_a_test.gd`
**Stub paths** (must be authored): `tests/helpers/battle_hud_stub.gd` + `tests/helpers/camera_stub.gd`; extend existing `tests/helpers/map_grid_stub.gd` (from hp-status epic)

**What to test** (story ACs 1-12 → GDD AC-5, AC-6, AC-7, AC-18 + F-1, F-2):
- F-1 derivation: `_compute_camera_zoom_min() -> float` returns `TOUCH_TARGET_MIN_PX (44) / tile_world_size (64) = 0.6875`; rounds to 0.70 for comfort margin; cached at `_ready()`. Constants from BalanceConstants ADR-0006
- AC-6 GDD touch target minimum: `tile_world_size * _camera_zoom_min == 44.8px` (above 44px floor); informational `0.6875 * 64 == 44.0px` exact floor
- TPP state tracking: 2 new fields `_last_tap_unit_id`, `_last_tap_time_ms`. On `&"unit_select"` in S0 + TOUCH mode: same unit + within `TPP_DOUBLE_TAP_WINDOW_MS (500ms)` → S1; else stay S0, update fields, emit `input_action_fired` for HUD
- AC-5 GDD TPP: first tap stays S0, `_last_tap_unit_id = 5`; second tap same unit within 500ms → S1; second tap different unit → S0, `_last_tap_unit_id` updated
- AC-7 GDD magnifier trigger F-2: `_should_trigger_magnifier(touch_pos, tile_display_px)` returns true when `tap_edge_offset < DISAMBIG_EDGE_PX (8)` OR `tile_display_px < DISAMBIG_TILE_PX (32)`
- AC-18 GDD no hover-only: sweep all 22 actions; every action except `grid_hover` (PC-only per CR-1c) has touch-equivalent binding in `default_bindings.json`; `grid_hover` reachable via TPP preview
- Battle HUD + Camera stubs created with recording call patterns; MapGrid stub extended with `get_unit_at(coord) -> int`
- New BalanceConstants entries (5): `TOUCH_TARGET_MIN_PX = 44`, `TILE_WORLD_SIZE = 64`, `TPP_DOUBLE_TAP_WINDOW_MS = 500`, `DISAMBIG_EDGE_PX = 8`, `DISAMBIG_TILE_PX = 32`

**Edge cases to cover**:
- F-1 at exact floor: zoom = 0.6875 → tile = 44.0px (boundary)
- F-2 — touch 10px from boundary AND tile 48px → returns false (neither dominates)
- F-2 — touch 10px from boundary AND tile 30px → returns true (tile size dominates)
- TPP — same unit second tap at exactly 500ms (boundary): document inclusive vs exclusive
- TPP — third tap on same unit while in S1: handled by S1 `_handle_action`, not TPP path

**Estimated test count**: ~12-14 integration tests

**Visual/Feel evidence (mandatory headless per EPIC.md items #3 + #5a)**:
- `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_03_emulate_mouse_from_touch.md` — verify `emulate_mouse_from_touch=false` in `project.godot` `[input_devices.pointing]` section (read content, assert presence). Status MUST be "Verified" before story ships.
- `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_05a_displayserver_screen_get_size.md` — `DisplayServer.screen_get_size()` returns logical (DPI-aware) pixels on macOS; log value at `_ready()`, assert sane. Status: "Verified macOS" + "Polish-deferred Android". Reactivation trigger for Android: physical 3× DPR Android device available.

---

### Story 009 — Touch part B: pan/tap/gestures/panel (Integration, ≥10 tests + 2 V/F evidence)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_touch_part_b_test.gd`

**What to test** (story ACs 1-12 → GDD AC-8, AC-9, EC-1 + F-3):
- F-3 classifier `_classify_pan_or_tap(touch_travel_px, hold_duration_ms) -> StringName`: returns `&"camera_pan"` if travel > `PAN_ACTIVATION_PX (16)`; `&"_rejected"` if `hold < MIN_TOUCH_DURATION_MS (80)` AND not pan; `&"unit_select"` otherwise
- AC-8 GDD pan classification: travel 20px + 100ms → `&"camera_pan"`; emit `input_action_fired(&"camera_pan", ctx)` (no state change)
- AC-9 GDD accidental rejection: travel 2px + 50ms → `&"_rejected"`; silent drop (no emit; `_did_visible_work` stays false)
- Two-finger gesture (CR-4g): `_handle_two_finger_gesture(event)` invoked when `event.index >= 1`; ALWAYS classified as camera (`&"camera_pinch_zoom"` for drag with size change, `&"camera_two_finger_tap_cancel"` for tap); NEVER routes to grid actions
- EC-1 multi-touch cancel: second-finger ARRIVAL (`index >= 1, pressed=true`) resets `_last_tap_unit_id = -1` + `_last_tap_time_ms = 0`; subsequent same-unit second tap on first finger does NOT advance to S1
- Safe-area API resolution at `_ready()`: `_resolve_safe_area_api() -> Vector4` tries 3 candidates in order — `DisplayServer.window_get_safe_title_margins()` (plural), `get_display_safe_area()`, fallback `Vector4.ZERO`. Cached as `_safe_area_inset`; graceful no-crash if none resolve
- Persistent action panel anti-occlusion (CR-4h): `_get_action_panel_position(state) -> Vector2` consults `window_get_size()` + `_safe_area_inset` + state anchor; emits `&"panel_reposition_request"` on every state transition where panel must update
- Accidental-touch sweep — 5 cases: (2,50,_rejected), (2,100,unit_select), (20,100,camera_pan), (20,50,camera_pan — travel dominates), (16.1,50,camera_pan — boundary just-above)
- New BalanceConstants (2): `PAN_ACTIVATION_PX = 16`, `MIN_TOUCH_DURATION_MS = 80`

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Touch at exact `PAN_ACTIVATION_PX` boundary (travel = 16) — document inclusive vs exclusive
- Hold at exact `MIN_TOUCH_DURATION_MS` boundary (hold = 80) — document
- Three-finger touch (`event.index >= 2`) — same as two-finger (camera-only routing)
- Safe-area all 3 candidates fail (desktop Linux build) — returns `Vector4.ZERO`, panel uses default anchors

**Estimated test count**: ~10-12 integration tests

**Visual/Feel evidence (mandatory headless #5b + Polish-defer #6)**:
- `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_05b_safe_area_api.md` — 3-candidate test result; log which (if any) resolves; document outcome. Status: "Resolved on dev" (likely `Vector4.ZERO` fallback in 4.6 desktop). Android verification reactivation trigger: device with notch + Android export green.
- `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_06_touch_event_index_stability.md` — physical-hardware test plan for two-finger gesture index assignment stability on iOS 17 + Android 14+. Polish-deferable. Headless fallback: synthetic-event injection covers EC-1 multi-touch cancel.

---

### Story 010 — Epic terminal (Config/Data, 4 perf tests + 9 lint scripts)
**Test file path (perf)**: `tests/performance/foundation/input_router_perf_test.gd`
**Lint script paths** (`tools/ci/`): 7 input-handling lints + `lint_emulate_mouse_from_touch.sh` + `lint_balance_entities_input_handling.sh`

**What to test** (story ACs 1-14 → ADR-0005 Performance + Validation + EPIC.md Same-Patch Obligations):

**Performance (4 tests, headless)**:
- `test_handle_event_under_0_05ms` — 1000-iteration p99 < 0.05ms
- `test_handle_action_under_0_02ms` — 1000-iteration p99 < 0.02ms
- `test_10k_synthetic_events_under_500ms` — full-throughput
- `test_ready_init_under_5ms` — single-shot autoload init (JSON parse + InputMap population + R-5 parity)

**CI lint scripts (9 total)**:
- `lint_input_router_no_input_override.sh` — exits 1 if `func _input(event` found in `input_router.gd` (Advisory C: only `_unhandled_input`)
- `lint_input_router_input_blocked_drop_without_set_input_as_handled.sh` — exits 1 if S5 grid-action drop missing paired `set_input_as_handled()` within 5 lines
- `lint_input_router_signal_emission_outside_input_domain.sh` — exits 1 if `GameBus.emit` count outside 3 input-domain signals > 0 (TR-017 non-emitter invariant)
- `lint_input_router_hardcoded_bindings.sh` — exits 1 if `KEY_*` / `MOUSE_BUTTON_*` / `JOY_BUTTON_*` enum literals appear (CR-1b enforcement)
- `lint_emulate_mouse_from_touch.sh` — exits 1 if `[input_devices.pointing]` missing `emulate_mouse_from_touch=false` (R-3)
- `lint_balance_entities_input_handling.sh` — for each of 7 input-handling keys, asserts presence + value within ADR-0005 §Tuning Knobs safe range
- `lint_input_router_g15_reset.sh` — for every `tests/unit/foundation/input_router_*_test.gd`, asserts `before_test()` resets all 6 architectural fields + 6+ transient fields (`_pending_end_phase`, `_pre_block_state`, `_last_tap_unit_id`, `_last_tap_time_ms`, `_touch_start_pos`, `_touch_start_time_ms`, `_touch_travel_px`, `_active_touch_indices`, `_grid_battle`, `_camera`, `_map_grid`)

**Other epic-terminal artifacts**:
- `assets/data/input/default_bindings.json` content COMPLETE — all 23 actions (22 - grid_hover + 2 new gestures) with ≥1 binding
- `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_summary.md` — 6-item rollup doc listing all verification items + per-story evidence files + final status (Verified / Polish-deferred / Resolved)
- 3 TD entries logged in `docs/tech-debt-register.md`: TD-054 (Polish on-device verification rollup), TD-055 (5 cross-system provisional contracts pending downstream ADRs), TD-056 (ADR-0001 line 168 amendment carried advisory)
- All 9 lint scripts wired into `.github/workflows/tests.yml`
- EPIC.md updated: Status `Ready` → `Complete (2026-MM-DD)`; final test baseline ≥837

**Edge cases to cover (perf)**:
- p99 measurement (NOT mean — guards against tail latency spikes)
- 1000-iteration warmup before measurement (G-21 perf-test discipline per damage-calc story-010 precedent)
- On-device measurement Polish-deferred (TD-054)

**Estimated test count**: 4 perf tests + 9 lint scripts (each a separate CI step)

## Manual QA Checklist

The InputRouter epic ships with **6 mandatory verification items** distributed across stories. Items #3, #4, #5a-dev, #5b are headless-verifiable + MUST complete in this epic. Items #1, #2, #5a-Android, #6 are Polish-deferable per the established pattern (5+ precedents).

### Verification #1 — Dual-focus end-to-end (story-005, Polish-deferable)
**Verification method**: On-device test on Android 14+ emulator + macOS Metal
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer (acceptance) + qa-lead (gate)
**Evidence**: `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_01_dual_focus.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Tap a Control with `focus_mode = FOCUS_ALL` to grab Control focus
- [ ] Press an arrow key
- [ ] Confirm `active_input_mode` switches per most-recent-event-class rule (KEYBOARD_MOUSE), NOT per focus-channel ownership (which would suggest TOUCH if Control still owns focus)
- [ ] Confirm subsequent keyboard inputs route normally (Control receives via `_gui_input`; InputRouter sees `_unhandled_input` for unhandled-by-Control events)
- [ ] If Polish-deferred: doc records reactivation trigger ("Android export green AND mac dev box available") + headless fallback noted ("AC-3 + AC-9 sweep cover the engine doesn't subvert event-class identity")

### Verification #2 — SDL3 gamepad detection (story-005, Polish-deferable)
**Verification method**: Bluetooth controller mid-scene on Android 15 / iOS 17
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer + qa-lead
**Evidence**: `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_02_sdl3_gamepad.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Connect Bluetooth controller AFTER scene loads
- [ ] Confirm `InputEventJoypadButton` events arrive (godot-specialist Item 3 plausible-but-unconfirmed)
- [ ] Confirm `_active_mode` STAYS `KEYBOARD_MOUSE` (no MVP gamepad mode promotion)
- [ ] Confirm Bluetooth disconnect mid-scene does not crash; subsequent input falls back to KM/touch
- [ ] If Polish-deferred: reactivation trigger ("physical Bluetooth gamepad + Android export") + headless fallback noted ("AC-6 synthetic InputEventJoypadButton injection")

### Verification #3 — emulate_mouse_from_touch (story-008, MANDATORY headless)
**Verification method**: Read `project.godot` content; assert `[input_devices.pointing]` section contains `emulate_mouse_from_touch=false`
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer (implementer) + qa-lead (gate)
**Evidence**: `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_03_emulate_mouse_from_touch.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] `project.godot` has `[input_devices.pointing]` section
- [ ] Section contains literal `emulate_mouse_from_touch=false`
- [ ] CI lint `lint_emulate_mouse_from_touch.sh` exits 0 (story-010 AC-6)
- [ ] If setting was previously `true` or unset: setting added + reasoning documented (R-3 mitigation per CR-2e — touch events MUST NOT synthesize fake mouse events; would create duplicate dispatch breaking TPP semantics)

### Verification #4 — Recursive Control disable (story-007, MANDATORY headless)
**Verification method**: Headless test that mounts InputRouter, calls both setters, injects synthetic event, asserts no `_handle_event` invocation
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer + qa-lead
**Evidence**: `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_04_recursive_control_disable.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Test scene mounts `/root/InputRouter` autoload
- [ ] Test calls `InputRouter.set_process_input(false)` AND `InputRouter.set_process_unhandled_input(false)` (godot-specialist Item 4 — both required for autoload Nodes)
- [ ] Test injects synthetic `InputEventKey.new()` event via `Input.parse_input_event()`
- [ ] Assert `_handle_event` is NOT invoked (no `_last_matched_action` mutation)
- [ ] Re-enable both setters → confirm `_handle_event` resumes invocation

### Verification #5a — DisplayServer.screen_get_size logical-pixel return (story-008, MANDATORY macOS dev; Polish-defer Android)
**Verification method**: At `_ready()`, log `DisplayServer.screen_get_size()` value; assert sane logical resolution (NOT physical-pixel multiplier)
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer + qa-lead
**Evidence**: `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_05a_displayserver_screen_get_size.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] macOS dev: `screen_get_size()` returns logical resolution (e.g., 1280x720 or 1920x1200, NOT 2560x1440 retina-doubled)
- [ ] Status: "Verified macOS" + "Polish-deferred Android"
- [ ] Polish reactivation trigger: physical 3× DPR Android device available + first Android export build green
- [ ] If Android returns physical pixels: F-1 derivation breaks (44px touch target violated); document mitigation path (call `DisplayServer.screen_get_dpi() / 96.0` divisor)

### Verification #5b — Safe-area API name (story-009, MANDATORY headless 3-candidate)
**Verification method**: At `_ready()`, attempt 3 candidate methods in order; log which (if any) resolves; document outcome
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer + qa-lead
**Evidence**: `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_05b_safe_area_api.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Try `DisplayServer.window_get_safe_title_margins()` (plural) — capture pass/fail
- [ ] Try `DisplayServer.get_display_safe_area()` — capture pass/fail
- [ ] Fall back to `Vector4.ZERO` (desktop) if neither candidate exists in 4.6
- [ ] No crash on graceful fallback
- [ ] Android device-with-notch reactivation trigger documented for Polish

### Verification #6 — Touch event index stability (story-009, Polish-deferable physical hardware)
**Verification method**: iOS 17 + Android 14+ physical-hardware two-finger gesture test
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer + qa-lead
**Evidence**: `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_06_touch_event_index_stability.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Two-finger touch sequence: first finger down → second finger down (`event.index = 1`) → first finger up → second finger up
- [ ] Assert `event.index` field stable across the sequence (Advisory B)
- [ ] If Polish-deferred: reactivation trigger ("physical iOS/Android device + first export build green") + headless fallback noted ("AC-5 EC-1 multi-touch cancel via synthetic events")

### Epic-terminal rollup (story-010)
**Evidence**: `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_summary.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] All 6 verification items listed with per-story evidence file links
- [ ] Each item shows final status: Verified / Polish-deferred / Resolved
- [ ] TD-054 cross-references for Polish-deferred items
- [ ] Pattern mirrors damage-calc story-010 perf summary precedent

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for the input-handling epic:

1. **Game launches without crash** — `/root/InputRouter` autoload loads at order 4 (after GameBus + SceneManager + SaveManager); `_ready()` body parses `default_bindings.json` + populates InputMap + R-5 parity validator passes; CI lint suite (9 input-handling lints + existing project lints) all exit 0
2. **22-action InputMap populated** — `InputMap.has_action(&"unit_select")` etc. returns true for all 22 actions (excluding PC-only `grid_hover` from JSON; included in `ACTIONS_BY_CATEGORY`)
3. **S0 → S1 → S2 → S0 happy path** — synthetic `&"unit_select"` → `&"move_target_select"` → `&"move_confirm"` round-trips; 3 `input_state_changed` emits captured; 3 `input_action_fired` emits with correct ctx
4. **S5 INPUT_BLOCKED nesting works** — block(transition) + block(dialog) + unblock(dialog) + unblock(transition) round-trip preserves `_pre_block_state`; grid actions silently dropped while in S5 with `set_input_as_handled()`
5. **S6 MENU_OPEN ST-2 demotion works** — open menu from S2 → close menu → state == S1 (NOT S2 — pending move-confirm dropped)
6. **Performance budget met (headless)** — `_handle_event` p99 < 0.05ms; `_handle_action` p99 < 0.02ms; 10k synthetic events < 500ms; `_ready()` init < 5ms (story-010 perf tests)
7. **Mode switching works** — synthetic touch event after key event sequence: `_active_mode` switches to TOUCH; `input_mode_changed` emits exactly once; `_state` + `_undo_windows` preserved (CR-2c)
8. **Touch fallback** — `default_bindings.json` covers every action with both PC + touch bindings (excluding `grid_hover` PC-only); AC-18 hover-only ban verified

*Smoke tests are verified via `/smoke-check sprint` after all 10 stories implement. Reference this list when running that skill.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|--------------|--------------|-------------------|
| 008 (Magnifier Panel CR-4c) | OQ-4: Is the magnifier panel UX understandable on first encounter? Does it help disambiguate small touch targets, or feel clunky? | 3 | New player on physical Android device (mid-tier) |
| 009 (Action Panel landscape position) | OQ-5: On landscape tablets, does the bottom-anchored action panel feel cramped vs. side-anchored? | 2 | Tablet player (10"+ landscape orientation) |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes must be written to `production/session-logs/playtest-sprint-3-input-handling-magnifier.md` and `playtest-sprint-3-input-handling-panel-landscape.md` and reviewed by the [game-designer / qa-lead] before story-008 / story-009 can be marked COMPLETE.

**Both playtests are advisory** (OQ-4 + OQ-5 are open questions in the GDD, not blocking acceptance criteria). User decides whether to run them now or Polish-defer per the standing pattern.

---

## Definition of Done — Input Handling Epic

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, video, or playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories — must pass; G-7 silent-skip check verified (case count actually advances)
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists at `production/qa/evidence/input_router_verification_NN_*.md` for stories 005, 007, 008, 009 (the 6 mandatory verification items)
- [ ] All 5 cross-system stubs authored at `tests/helpers/{grid_battle,battle_hud,camera}_stub.gd` + `tests/helpers/map_grid_stub.gd` extended (Settings + Tutorial as future-ADR placeholders, no stubs yet)
- [ ] G-15 reset obligation in `before_test()` includes `_bindings.clear()` per delta #6 godot-specialist Item 7 (story-010 lint enforces — story-002 onward)
- [ ] `assets/data/input/default_bindings.json` contains all 23 actions (22 - grid_hover + 2 new gestures from story-009) with at least 1 binding each
- [ ] `emulate_mouse_from_touch=false` set in `project.godot` `[input_devices.pointing]` section + CI lint passes (story-008 AC-8 + story-010 AC-6)
- [ ] All 9 CI lint scripts wired into `.github/workflows/tests.yml` (story-010 AC-12); CI green on every push
- [ ] Performance budget met (headless): `_handle_event < 0.05ms`, `_handle_action < 0.02ms`, 10k events < 500ms, `_ready()` init < 5ms (story-010 AC-1)
- [ ] Final regression baseline ≥837 GdUnit4 cases / 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans / Exit 0 (story-010 AC-13)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off — covers 8 critical paths above)
- [ ] No regressions introduced in turn-order / hp-status / damage-calc / map-grid baselines (cross-epic guardrail)
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` per story or documented peer review)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] EPIC.md updated by story-010 closing pass: Status `Ready` → `Complete (2026-MM-DD)`; Stories table populated 10/10; final test baseline + commit ref recorded
- [ ] 3 TD entries logged in `docs/tech-debt-register.md`: TD-054 (on-device verification Polish), TD-055 (5 cross-system provisional contracts), TD-056 (ADR-0001 line 168 carried advisory)
